title: Curaleaf Holdings (CURLF) Stock Analysis and Financial Overview
text: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. engages in the retail and wholesale of cannabis products in the United States and internationally, operating licensed cultivation and pharma-grade cannabis processing and manufacturing facilities. The company supplies cannabis on a wholesale basis to Australia, New Zealand, the United Kingdom and various European countries. In the most recent earnings report, the company reported an EPS of $0.09 versus an estimated EPS of -$0.08, representing a surprise of +218.58%. The next estimated earnings date is August 5, 2026. Curaleaf Holdings came out with quarterly earnings of $0.09 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.08 per share compared to a loss of $0.07 per share a year ago. The company posted revenues of $324.23 million for the quarter ended March 2026, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 2.40%, compared to year-ago revenues of $310.01 million. The company has topped consensus revenue estimates three times over the last four quarters. Curaleaf operates 154 retail locations and is the largest cannabis MSO by revenue.
